name: Wasteland War-Raptor
oracle_text:
Haste, trample
Whenever ~ attacks, it gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the number of other attacking creatures.
flavor_text: The moktars don't ride them. They just run in the same direction and hope.
design_notes: A 3/3 haste trample for 4 is reasonable at uncommon — two keywords plus a combat trigger is appropriate complexity. The attack trigger rewards going wide, which synergizes with WR (Spark Rebellion) token strategies and RG (Dinosaur/aggressive) builds. The power boost is temporary and requires committing multiple creatures to combat, creating real risk/reward. Base 3/3 means it's solid alone but becomes a real threat with a board. X varies meaningfully based on board state.
